chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-3649 of 2012 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA No.7912/2021 2. For hearing of main case 07-12-2023 Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner, no intimation received. On the last date of hearing Mr. Shahbaz Husain counsel for the petitioner was not present and on his behalf request for adjournment was made, a last and final chance was given but today he has chosen to remain absent which shows lack of interest on his part. Accordingly this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
